description: Uffizi golden search cases (12): the per-museum accuracy north-star for the Uffizi rows in the merged artifact. Authored 2026-07-06 against the 2,539-row on-view harvest from the ArCo SPARQL endpoint (dati.beniculturali.it). 6 Italian-query cases exercise the source-language titles/artists; 6 English-for-Italian cases exercise the contentless-FTS titleAlt indexing (DeepSeek IT→EN). EN cases assert expectObjectIDs because search results return the Italian title (titleAlt is index-only in shared/search.ts) — ids are stable 48-bit hashes of uffizi/{sourceId}.

cases.note: IT; Botticelli's Birth of Venus, sala A12 (sourceId 0900158551)
IT; Caravaggio's Medusa shield (plus its anonymous copy), sala E4
IT; Leonardo's unfinished Adoration, sala A35
IT artist form 'Filipepi Alessandro detto Botticelli' — the byname must still match
EN-for-IT via titleAlt ('nascita di Venere' → 'birth of Venus'); result title stays Italian, so assert the id
EN-for-IT via titleAlt; Caravaggio original or the copy hanging beside it both acceptable (sala E4)
EN-for-IT via titleAlt ('Bacco ebbro' → 'Drunken Bacchus'), Rubens, sala 55
EN-for-IT via titleAlt ('Tondo Doni, Sacra Famiglia…' → 'Doni Tondo, Holy Family…')
EN-for-IT via titleAlt ('Annunciazione' → 'Annunciation') + artist term, sala A35
EN-for-IT via titleAlt ('sacrificio di Isacco' → 'sacrifice of Isaac'), sala E2
